programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: First of a two-part investigation of the biggest scandal in Church of England history, telling the inside story of prolific abuser John Smyth's sinister world through testimony from his children and widow. In the 1980s, John Smyth was a high-flying barrister offering discipleship to young Christians at Winchester College, then began to invite them to lunches and parties at his family home. Before long he introduced them to a secret and brutal regime, involving cane beatings that he justified as spiritual discipline intended to relieve them of their sins

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: The concluding part explores the new life John Smyth built in Zimbabwe, where he set up Christian summer camps that provided him access to hundreds of young boys every year, with the camps involving enforced nudity, skinny dipping and beatings on a hugely increased scale. The programme also explores the suspicious death of Guide Nyacharu, a schoolboy who was found dead in a swimming pool at one of Smyth's camps

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Matt Shea sets out on the trail of wanted criminals evading justice in an attempt to reveal the shocking scale of this country's hidden fugitive crisis. His journey leads him from safehouses in London to an underground network in Thailand, as he uncovers a shocking new mentality among criminals, where justice is optional. What does this mean for victims of crime and for confidence in the criminal justice system?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: How to make a tin-can dog and turn the humble loo roll into a host of fun and friendly animals

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Sarah and Graham turn their attention to creating a theatrical dining room, with a large centrepiece table that used to belong to Ronnie Wood

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith discover Norm's hidden talent as an interior designer and recommend him to their friends - but he soon finds himself leading a double life. Meanwhile, Woody worries about Cliff's psychiatric problems

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: How to Win Friends and Electrocute People
programme.desc: Frasier persuades Cliff to undergo a course of electric-shock therapy as a means of making friends and influencing people. Kelsey Grammer and John Ratzenberger star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In a feeble attempt to prove their masculinity, Norm, Woody and Cliff pretend they've been skydiving - but a revelation from Rebecca makes Sam decide to take the plunge for real. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friend's 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier fail dismally in their bid to get tickets for a popular new theatre production, while Daphne achieves the dubious distinction of having a photograph of her bottom appear in a Seattle newspaper

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin decides to set Frasier up with Duke's beautiful daughter Marie, but it soon becomes clear she is only interested in him because she needs a psychiatrist and does not want to pay for one. Guest starring Teri Hatcher

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris tries to woo Niles with anonymous presents, but Frasier thinks the gifts were intended for him and risks his latest relationship to learn the identity of his secret admirer. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles's expensive divorce leaves him penniless, forcing him to move into Frasier and Martin's apartment. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Surrey, where they visit a collector of Kawasaki motorbikes

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A family from Manchester juggles renovations and running a holiday complex in France. A couple from Kent prepare to take ownership of a village in Portugal, and the owners of a bed and breakfast in southern France tackle the exterior of their enormous new home

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Heather and John love Greece so much that they want their very own characterful bolthole on Crete. They've fallen for northern Crete and it's easy to see why, thanks to its stunning historic towns, gorgeous coastline and long summer seasons. Jasmine Harman shows the couple five options for their budget of £150,000, from detached delights and ice-cream inspiration to grapevines galore and a quirky courtyard

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Veteran continuous cruiser Jay embarks on his next adventure in Nottinghamshire, while in Yorkshire, Claire pushes ahead with her tugboat greenhouse dreams. On the Shropshire Union Canal, Paul, Anthony and a flotilla of boaters rock up to an Elvis tribute performed by fellow narrowboater Paul

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jon and Carmen hope to finally get married after years of colossal DIY challenges. Jon and Carmen hope to finally get married. Terry and Ashley try to bring their opulent vision to life, and Christina and Sassan scramble to finish their guest apartment

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Sisters Sophie and Charlotte Rodriguez help golf fanatic Paul and his wife Jo find an Alicante villa to make their new permanent home in Spain. In Almería, Sharon Garner and her son Shaun hunt for a retirement retreat for Yorkshire couple Sally and Kevin, armed with a budget of 250,000 euros

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds
programme.desc: George is in the north-east London suburb of Woodford Green, where he meets widow Shaz and her two growing children in their classic Victorian terrace home. After the death of husband and father David, the family are determined to stay in the house they all shared, so George is called upon to confront what needs to change while preserving the family's memories of David in the house and garden and futureproofing the home for Shaz and her children

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The penultimate edition sees four of the contestants in with a realistic chance of becoming the 21st Taskmaster champion - while Joel Dommett is just having a really good time. Alex Horne is delighted to be put in charge of a flip-flop flinging machine, Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg, Kumail Nanjiani tries planking and Armando Iannucci shows why it's important not to curtail his nap time

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A pair of teenage schoolgirls ask Sam and his crew to make a movie about their favourite teacher, Miss Stanthorpe, who never got a chance to go to her own prom. The headmaster backs the project in a bid to look cool, hapless Sebastian spills food on his top - reverting to his childlike self and rejoining Year 8 - and the girls compete over who should play the young Miss Stanthorpe. Comedy from the mind of Sam Campbell, who stars alongside Lara Ricote, Aaron Chen and David Hargreaves

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Gurnsfield United are a bottom league team without a chance, but number one fan Ewin wants to see them win, if only on the big screen. Sam and the gang can't resist making such an innocent dream come true - only to find themselves being sued by an eccentric British writer for inadvertently stealing one of his characters

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Bobby Dazzler
programme.desc: A stand-up special in which the comedian explains the best way to eat a kiwi fruit, how a 'vagina candle' should smell, trying to lose weight but only losing the tip of one's finger and the experience of undergoing a surprisingly funny smear test

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Drama written by Russell T Davies, about a bar owner in Manchester's gay village who becomes embroiled in a feud with his long-standing neighbour. Leo fights to defend the safety of one of his bar staff, while his next-door neighbour Clive is searching for work, and realises Leo might be the answer to all of his problems. Starring Alan Cumming and David Morrissey

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Leo suspects someone has been inside his house, and when he has dinner with his ex, Curtis, all his old fears rise up. Clive starts work on Leo's bar on Canal Street. But when he gets assistance from his son, Saul, who gets recognised, it sets into motion a series of events that lead to a shocking conclusion. Drama, starring Alan Cumming and David Morrissey

programme.title: Fire Island (2022)
programme.desc: A group of best friends gathers in Fire Island Pines for an annual week of love and laughter. However, a sudden change of events might make this their last summer in gay paradise. Comedy romance, starring Joel Kim Booster, Bowen Yang and Margaret Cho

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Sarah and her family decide to build a thatched boathouse on their edge of their pond, taking inspiration from the historic boathouses down the River Thames. After completing the walls, the whole family pitch in to thatch the roof, before Graham adds a final flourish with carvings the boys made in their workshop. The boys also discover a novel way of cooking breakfast al fresco by making a Swedish torch from a log

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier proves to be a complete disaster as a children's party clown and Sam falls for the daughter of a former girlfriend. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars II - The Woodman Strikes Back
programme.desc: The day of the annual Boston Bloody Mary Competition dawns and Sam and the gang are determined to beat Gary's Old Town Tavern this time, even if it means cheating

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An entrepreneur leaves his pet in Rebecca's apparently capable hands, but Sam jeopardises her job by letting the dog escape. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Seal Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier prepare for a dinner party at Maris's beach house, but a bizarre turn of events results in them having to devote all their time to disposing of a dead seal that has washed up on the shore

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Unemployed Roz is reduced to borrowing money from Frasier, but he thinks she is spending it irresponsibly. Meanwhile, rumours circulate that KACL is rehiring staff. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A friendly woman comes to Frasier's rescue when he's out Christmas shopping. He offers to return the favour, but the last thing he expects is to end up on a blind date with her daughter - while pretending to be Jewish. Meanwhile, Niles takes part in a festive pageant

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A series of good deeds backfires, embroiling Frasier in a humiliating scandal and causing him to question his faith in human nature. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Dumfries and Galloway, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Alan, who works in the forestry business. Henry decides to give four bar stools a bright makeover, while Simon transforms two old sheep shearer seats into an extraordinary bench

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A derelict building in a French village gets a new lease of life. Meanwhile, in Portugal, a couple dip their toes into their first season as holiday hosts, and in southern France, a very special event takes place in a refurbished chapel

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Penny from Staffordshire searches for a new home where she can run her business in Malaga. Laura Hamilton lines up five great options for her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Claire heads to a local garden centre to kit out her floating greenhouse. Paul rediscovers his artistic side, and his towpath pop-up at Fradley Junction proves a runaway success. Continuous cruiser Jay reaches Stoke-on-Trent just in time for his stand-up comedy performance, but not before a huge canal breach diverts his journey. And will the River Canal Rescue team finally manage to lift the burnt-out boat to safety?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de la Boutinière, after five years of hard work, this once-abandoned and graffiti-covered shell prepares to host its biggest ever wedding. But with just days to go, Alison and Zion race to get every final detail right. In the Loire Valley, at Château de la Croix Boisée, Vivienne and Simon strike up the overture for a retirement party worthy of Vivienne's opera-singing mother, but their terrace is still far from centre stage. And in Normandy, Xavier and Tasha finally get the keys to their dream home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Steve Garner juggle competing priorities as they search for a Spanish 'forever home' for golf-mad Graham and his wife Tracy, with a top budget of 230,000 euros. On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons are armed with a whopping 1.3 million euros to find a home for Joanne who, after five years of renting locally, is finally ready to put down roots

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a builder show that age is just a number. A hip-hop artist meets a musician looking for love off stage. Two 19-year-olds take their first dating steps together and a weightlifter and a bodybuilder weigh up their options

programme.title: BlackBerry (2023)
programme.desc: In 1996, engineering student Mike Lazaridis and best friend Douglas Fregin stand on the precipice of creating the world's first smartphone. However, a series of disastrous events paves the way for the gadget's eventual demise. Comedy, starring Jay Baruchel, Glenn Howerton and Matt Johnson

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The penultimate edition sees four of the contestants in with a realistic chance of becoming the 21st Taskmaster champion - while Joel Dommett is just having a really good time. Alex Horne is delighted to be put in charge of a flip-flop flinging machine, Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg, Kumail Nanjiani tries planking and Armando Iannucci shows why it's important not to curtail his nap time

programme.title: The Lighthouse (2019)
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, Ephraim Winslow is hired to work for a month on an isolated island off the coast of New England, under the supervision of an irritable old man named Thomas Wake. Winslow tries to stay sane as Wake assigns him a series of arduous tasks, but that seems to be the toughest job of all. Co-writer/director Robert Eggers' psychological thriller, starring Robert Pattinson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Drama written by Russell T Davies, about a bar owner in Manchester's gay village who becomes embroiled in a feud with his long-standing neighbour. Leo fights to defend the safety of one of his bar staff, while his next-door neighbour Clive is searching for work, and realises Leo might be the answer to all of his problems. Starring Alan Cumming and David Morrissey

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: The concluding part explores the new life John Smyth built in Zimbabwe, where he set up Christian summer camps that provided him access to hundreds of young boys every year, with the camps involving enforced nudity, skinny dipping and beatings on a hugely increased scale. The programme also explores the suspicious death of Guide Nyacharu, a schoolboy who was found dead in a swimming pool at one of Smyth's camps

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Matt Shea sets out on the trail of wanted criminals evading justice in an attempt to reveal the shocking scale of this country's hidden fugitive crisis. His journey leads him from safehouses in London to an underground network in Thailand, as he uncovers a shocking new mentality among criminals, where justice is optional. What does this mean for victims of crime and for confidence in the criminal justice system?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: How to make a tin-can dog and turn the humble loo roll into a host of fun and friendly animals

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Sarah and Graham turn their attention to creating a theatrical dining room, with a large centrepiece table that used to belong to Ronnie Wood

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith discover Norm's hidden talent as an interior designer and recommend him to their friends - but he soon finds himself leading a double life. Meanwhile, Woody worries about Cliff's psychiatric problems

programme.sub-title: How to Win Friends and Electrocute People
programme.desc: Frasier persuades Cliff to undergo a course of electric-shock therapy as a means of making friends and influencing people. Kelsey Grammer and John Ratzenberger star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In a feeble attempt to prove their masculinity, Norm, Woody and Cliff pretend they've been skydiving - but a revelation from Rebecca makes Sam decide to take the plunge for real. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.desc: Penny from Staffordshire searches for a new home where she can run her business in Malaga. Laura Hamilton lines up five great options for her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Claire heads to a local garden centre to kit out her floating greenhouse. Paul rediscovers his artistic side, and his towpath pop-up at Fradley Junction proves a runaway success. Continuous cruiser Jay reaches Stoke-on-Trent just in time for his stand-up comedy performance, but not before a huge canal breach diverts his journey. And will the River Canal Rescue team finally manage to lift the burnt-out boat to safety?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de la Boutinière, after five years of hard work, this once-abandoned and graffiti-covered shell prepares to host its biggest ever wedding. But with just days to go, Alison and Zion race to get every final detail right. In the Loire Valley, at Château de la Croix Boisée, Vivienne and Simon strike up the overture for a retirement party worthy of Vivienne's opera-singing mother, but their terrace is still far from centre stage. And in Normandy, Xavier and Tasha finally get the keys to their dream home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Steve Garner juggle competing priorities as they search for a Spanish 'forever home' for golf-mad Graham and his wife Tracy, with a top budget of 230,000 euros. On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons are armed with a whopping 1.3 million euros to find a home for Joanne who, after five years of renting locally, is finally ready to put down roots

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a builder show that age is just a number. A hip-hop artist meets a musician looking for love off stage. Two 19-year-olds take their first dating steps together and a weightlifter and a bodybuilder weigh up their options

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Bobby Dazzler
programme.desc: A stand-up special in which the comedian explains the best way to eat a kiwi fruit, how a 'vagina candle' should smell, trying to lose weight but only losing the tip of one's finger and the experience of undergoing a surprisingly funny smear test

programme.title: The Lighthouse (2019)
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, Ephraim Winslow is hired to work for a month on an isolated island off the coast of New England, under the supervision of an irritable old man named Thomas Wake. Winslow tries to stay sane as Wake assigns him a series of arduous tasks, but that seems to be the toughest job of all. Co-writer/director Robert Eggers' psychological thriller, starring Robert Pattinson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over

programme.desc: A scatterbrained society woman looks for a change of pace after her husband dies on their wedding night, and is tricked by a duplicitous recruiter into enlisting in the army. In spite of the initial culture shock and conflict with her tough commanding officer, she gradually finds direction and self-esteem for the first time in her life. Upon completion of basic training, she meets a dashing French doctor, who is in Biloxi for a medical conference. They part ways after a brief romance but it is not long before she must decide between her Army career or love. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Armand Assante, Eileen Brennan, Harry Dean Stanton, Sam Wanamaker and Barbara Barrie

programme.desc: A scatterbrained society woman looks for a change of pace after her husband dies on their wedding night, and is tricked by a duplicitous recruiter into enlisting in the army. In spite of the initial culture shock and conflict with her tough commanding officer, she gradually finds direction and self-esteem for the first time in her life. Upon completion of basic training, she meets a dashing French doctor, who is in Biloxi for a medical conference. They part ways after a brief romance but it is not long before she must decide between her Army career or love. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Armand Assante, Eileen Brennan, Harry Dean Stanton, Sam Wanamaker and Barbara Barrie

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Tired of the family's obsession with electronic gadgets, Claire and Phil declare a household challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest. programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's emotional sister Pam proves too much for Mitchell when she comes to visit, while Phil and Claire struggle to stay awake during a spontaneous trip to Paris. Jay's bathroom remodeling project frustrates Gloria, and Andy has a wild night out in Las Vegas with Haley

programme.title: The Simpsons

Meanwhile, Homer is on a mission to find a fat people's rights group after a humiliating incident in which he gets stuck in his seat. With the guest voice of Pharrell Williams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is told to entertain a visiting Nigerian princess whose father is in town for a business meeting with Mr Burns, but when she proves uninterested in the TV, he takes her to Moe's, where she and the normally irascible barman strike a surprisingly sweet friendship. With the guest voices of Jon Lovitz and Richard Branson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is convinced Bart is lying when he denies any responsibility for a bulldozer crash, so she doggedly follows her mischief-making son's every step in the hope he will eventually crumble and confess. programme.title: The Simpsons

As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction

Crystal and Jon are tired of suburbia and want to change their lifestyle by moving downtown with their two teenage daughters. But before they can start city-living, the brothers must hunt down a dreamy downsize. And the couple learn that it's easier said than done when working with tight margins

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Bournemouth are confident Nikki and Steve, who've been together for 20 years. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Young Brighton couple Hannah and Luke kick off the competition with an ambitiously trendy menu, then more experienced hosts Karen and Mark step up to the plate the next day, followed by Rachel and TJ, who have given nothing away to their fellow hosts

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to make up for past mistakes by giving his fiancee Lydia the wedding of her dreams. However, his history of reckless spending and determination to plan a lavish party do not bode well for the bride, who has her heart set on a church ceremony just like her mother's

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bryon Stephens, the president and chief operating officer of Marco's Pizza, dons a disguise to work incognito with his employees - from delivery drivers to managers - so that he can assess how the organisation and its many franchises are faring.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Adler, the president and chief executive of off-road accessory empire 4 Wheel Parts, goes undercover in his own firm. Within five years, he hopes to turn the company into a billion-dollar business with more than 100 stores, and he intends to make sure that it continues to provide high standards of customer service as it grows.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if he's going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Angler's Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Things get physical between Dan and Dave when the desert heat sets tempers on edge, while Ivy plays it cool bidding on a high-risk locker

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.title: Peep Show

programme.desc: Mark and Sophie are engaged to be married, but the groom-to-be keeps having crippling doubts. programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Courtland Gray, the COO of audio equipment manufacturer Peavey Electronics, is poised to take over the Mississippi-based company when his stepfather, founder and CEO Hartley Peavey, is ready to hand over the reins. As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. He's proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, it's in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure it's fully prepared to take them on

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dippin' Dots is an American brand that sells cryogenically frozen beads of ice-cream. Recently, it enjoyed its busiest summer, scooping 146 billion dots and making an annual revenue of $300million. But, before that, in 2012, the company was on the brink of bankruptcy, until owner and CEO Scott Fischer turned its fortunes around. Here, he infiltrates his workforce to find out if his expanding empire has the manpower to cope. As his alter ego Brad, a man looking for a new career, he goes undercover, meeting a factory production operator, a warehouse supervisor, a sales supervisor and a server

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Things do not run smoothly for three Bournemouth couples, as one pair are late with their cooking, talk of butchering causes upset and a pescatarian is accidentally served meat

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Lee and Nicky begin the contest in Bristol with an Italian-themed menu, followed by Libby and Graham, who have been married for 54 years, and lively couple Nico and Sky

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Eccentric 27-year-old Chris plans every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to give his sensible fiancee Corraine a fairy-tale wedding to prove how much she means to him. However, the bride is concerned with the practicalities of being eight months pregnant on the big day, and without her grounding influence, the groom's wild ideas could spin out of control

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Space enthusiast Anthony is given full responsibility for organising his and fashion-conscious fiancee Holly's wedding, with a budget of £12,000 and a time constraint of three weeks. Holly's original plan to have an elegant Italian-style event hit the buffers, so Anthony is under more pressure than ever to provide something to please her

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Ashley and Brandon Wright, the co-owners of Hamburger Mary's, go incognito in their own company, hoping to ensure that their culture of diversity and acceptance is maintained as the business expands. Ashley goes undercover to appear with drag performer Jayla at a brunch show, and Brandon works a shift with bar manager Melissa, who feels underappreciated after eight years' of hard work

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dan Duffy, the Chief Executive of United Real Estate Group, adopts a disguise to go undercover in his own company. Dan meets many different employees to learn about their professional standards and also their personal lives.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isn't what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Town's Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hope auctions in the California college town of Rancho Dominguez will land them big money. Mary decides to explore her mean side, while Darrell and Brandon look for more bargains

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers struggle in Santa Ana and head to an auction in Hawaiian Gardens looking for more success. Mary tries to stay within budget and new competition arrives

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Sales assistant Michelle and supermarket manager Shaun's classical evening gets the week off to a stylish start, although their guests' interpretation of classical is a little different. Next up, charity worker Amber and marine engineer Lee's basic Mexican menu doesn't go down very well. On the last night, retired businessmen Adrian and Mark's well thought-out menu and unusual entertainment bring everything to a lively conclusion

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. The Taskmaster's much-admired assistant, Little Alex Horne, has many talents. He can use a stopwatch, he can record statistics and he can comb Greg Davies' hair every night for exactly 20 minutes. But can he competently wield a pair of pliers? Rosie Jones is keen to find out. Elsewhere, Andy Zaltzman finds a really important pen, Jack Dee adopts a charismatic New York accent, Babátúndé Aléshé creates a lovely little otter and Emma Sidi enjoys some horrible wine

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson takes on guest captain Johnny Vegas in another round of words-and-numbers chaos. Hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Grandma's wedding day arrives and the Goodmans are disturbed by the thought of her marrying the horrible Mr Morris. Robert Popper's comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Frances Cuka and Harry Landis

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Fourth series of the sitcom, starring Paul Ritter and Tamsin Greig. Dad develops a serious dislike of an annoying man with a bad habit of talking with his eyes closed. However, when he accidentally invites him to come round for dinner, he has a hard time getting rid of him

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark is offered a promotion on condition that he delivers a presentation to the entire board, while Johnson takes a shine to Big Suze and tries to bribe Jeremy into letting him sleep with her. Robert Webb and David Mitchell star

programme.desc: Mark continues to be tormented by doubts about marrying Sophie, and joins a gym to spend as much time away from her as possible. Meanwhile, Jeremy starts working as a cleaner in a bid to get closer to ex-wife Nancy, hoping for a reconciliation

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr is joined by captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for highlights from the latest series of the comedy panel show. A host of well-known faces make up the teams as they discuss the topical events that set the public's chins wagging

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: A Dance As Old As Time Itself
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. The Taskmaster's much-admired assistant, Little Alex Horne, has many talents. He can use a stopwatch, he can record statistics and he can comb Greg Davies' hair every night for exactly 20 minutes. But can he competently wield a pair of pliers? Rosie Jones is keen to find out. Elsewhere, Andy Zaltzman finds a really important pen, Jack Dee adopts a charismatic New York accent, Babátúndé Aléshé creates a lovely little otter and Emma Sidi enjoys some horrible wine

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson takes on guest captain Johnny Vegas in another round of words-and-numbers chaos. Their team-mates are Alex Brooker and Sara Pascoe, while Claudia Winkleman and Rob Beckett stand in for Rachel Riley on letters-and-numbers duty, and Tom Allen is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent. Hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dental nurse Jade, who's 25, is set up on a date with handsome tree surgeon Tom. Meanwhile, Sharran - the UK's only female sumo wrestler - meets David, a former bingo-caller, who has been unlucky in love in the past, and City trader Adam is set up on a date with 28-year-old party girl Leena from Liverpool

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Charity worker Freddie, who's 27, is set up on a date with 22-year-old fashion buyer Rebecca, hoping that she will be the girl who will be able to get his unique sense of humour. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Army medic Lyn meets Steve, a 38-year-old ex-Army engineer, but the date takes an interesting turn when she reveals that she is pregnant. Elsewhere, 52-year-old Jazz singer Gina is set up with 57-year-old singer-songwriter Nik, and food buyer Cindy from Leeds goes on a date with sales representative Elan

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly replaces Murray's favourite chair with a new one without consulting him first, causing him to go on the warpath. Adam becomes tired of being picked on during the bus ride to school, but soon comes to regret enlisting Barry to help fend off the bully

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray intervenes when Adam asks Beverly to help him avoid the humiliation of taking a national physical fitness test at school. Meanwhile, Erica decides to have some fun at Barry's expense when he tries to woo her French pen pal

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable 'sky high' wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with a plumber. Meanwhile, the tremor causes Manny to experience an existential crisis, and Mitchell struggles to remain calm. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane (The Producers)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In an episode inspired by Hitchcock thriller Strangers on a Train, Claire and Mitchell agree to be brutally honest with each other's partners - so Phil is informed his stand-up comedy is cringeworthy, and Cam is told his decision to wear biker shorts is unwise. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, civil partners Andrew and David serve up a 'ritzy' affair for their guests, but their food gets a mixed reaction. On the second night, hosts Emma and Richard face a grilling over their use of shop-bought ingredients. Meanwhile, Richard and Joey's 'bromance' develops when they feed each other heart-shaped strawberries. Last to host are newlyweds Joey and Hannah, who serve basic wholesome food, but argue over the size of their fishcakes

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone heads to Jay and Gloria's when a huge storm causes a power cut, although so many people in such close quarters can only spell trouble

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire manages to easily balance running Jay's closet business with her domestic tasks, but she might be exploiting a secret weapon. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam are snubbed at their friends' wedding, leaving them to wonder what they might have done to deserve such rude treatment. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simon Cowell provides the voice of the sharp-tongued administrator of a nursery for gifted children who has the job of deciding whether to accept Maggie. As the possibility of successful admission becomes more likely, Lisa feels her position as the intelligent one in the family is being threatened

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Reviews of The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne, Mammals, You Won't Believe This and Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 30-year-old Pablo, who is HIV positive and hopes to break the stigma about his condition, and Leon, a musician and rapper from Burnley, take part

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry hosts a 'no parents allowed' birthday party for Adam, instead of the laser tag party that was originally planned. He hopes to help his little brother get his first kiss with Dana, but his action sparks some surprisingly protective instincts in Erica. Comedy, starring Troy Gentile and Sean Giambrone

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica's boyfriend dumps her, Beverly finds a handsome new date to take her daughter to a party. Meanwhile, Barry becomes addicted to an arcade video game and will stop at nothing to get the money to play it

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High school lovebirds Maria and Ryan, his best man Tavis and Maria's sister Veronica are together again on camera for the first time since their school-themed wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Tired of the family's obsession with electronic gadgets, Claire and Phil declare a household challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest. Mitch and Cameron frantically try to get Lily into the best pre-school, while Jay and Manny are concerned at the lengths to which Gloria will go to stop the neighbour's dog barking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire prepares the Dunphy household for Halloween, but the rest of the family is less enthusiastic. The spooky goings-on remind Cameron of a traumatic childhood experience, and Gloria is upset when Jay and Manny make fun of her accent

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Ashford, Kent, francophiles Stephanie and Ian kick of the competition by serving French food from a home emulating the Palace of Versailles. The second night sees city slickers Louise and Dan attempt to secure their lead with spreadsheet organisation, before fun-loving couple Pippa and Lee make a bid for the prize with a mixture of fancy dress, stripping off, wacky voices and homely food

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay switches sides after joining Cam's bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Bad moods must be catching when Phil and Jay spend the afternoon together. Meanwhile, Gloria teaches Haley how to stand up to her boss. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons' home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlord's generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: After ducking out of a bonding session with Grampa, a guilt-ridden Homer vows to make it up to his father by granting him a wish. The old man decides to visit Ireland and drop in on his favourite pub from his army days. Upon arrival, the pair discover the bar is a shadow of its former self, and agree to buy the business and turn its fortunes around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer proposes to Marge for the second time when he discovers their marriage licence is invalid, but the ceremony does not proceed without a hitch. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Julie Kavner

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A small lie spirals out of control for Phil when he tries to hide the fact he has an attractive new client from Claire, who is keeps her handsome yoga teacher. Elsewhere, Jay becomes obsessed with tracking down a troll who's been leaving nasty comments about his web show, and Mitch and Cam try to teach a nervous Lily to ride a bicycle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's emotional sister Pam proves too much for Mitchell when she comes to visit, while Phil and Claire struggle to stay awake during a spontaneous trip to Paris. Jay's bathroom remodeling project frustrates Gloria, and Andy has a wild night out in Las Vegas with Haley

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and the kids cause havoc as they desperately try to hide a stray dog from Phil, while Jay finds himself in a pickle when Gloria tries to make friends with another couple and Cameron rents out his upstairs apartment to a rock band

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With their prom just around the corner, Luke and Manny find themselves with big decisions to make about who to ask, but their situation is made all the more nerve-wrecking when Cam and Mitch decide to interfere. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria confront a competitor about stealing a hot sauce recipe and Claire grows concerned that she has a mole in her company

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The proud residents of Springfield are outraged when they learn their town anthem was stolen from a travelling musician, so Bart and Lisa volunteer to find a replacement song. Meanwhile, Homer is on a mission to find a fat people's rights group after a humiliating incident in which he gets stuck in his seat. With the guest voice of Pharrell Williams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is told to entertain a visiting Nigerian princess whose father is in town for a business meeting with Mr Burns, but when she proves uninterested in the TV, he takes her to Moe's, where she and the normally irascible barman strike a surprisingly sweet friendship. With the guest voices of Jon Lovitz and Richard Branson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. To make matters worse, Marge and the rest of the congregation are short of funds to repair their beloved place of worship - so they resort to gambling to raise the necessary funds

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is convinced Bart is lying when he denies any responsibility for a bulldozer crash, so she doggedly follows her mischief-making son's every step in the hope he will eventually crumble and confess. Meanwhile, it's a case of out with the old and in with the new when Homer gives Santa's Little Helper the cold shoulder in favour of Flanders' new pooch

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A parliamentary assistant fears talking politics scares men away, but may have met her match in an outspoken journalist. A 69-year-old former roadie is looking for someone to settle down with after surviving cancer, while a Lithuanian spa therapist searches for an older man who she can start a family with

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Voiceover artist Nick, 62, is set up on a date with 52-year-old golfer Laura, and 22-year-old Jordan, a boxer for Team Great Britain, meets 23-year-old Thai boxer Chloe. Elsewhere, telecoms analyst Ketan, who has high-functioning autism and has been reluctant to reveal it to any potential partner, goes on a date with Brodie

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, critiquing The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House and The Mating Game. They also offer their thoughts on ITV News of COP26 and other stories. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reiki healer and animal communicator Jayne is set up on a date with 44-year-old children's entertainer Stuart. Meanwhile, headstrong parliamentary researcher Cecilia, who's 23, is looking for a man to match her drive and determination, and may have met her match when she meets straight-talking business development manager Viv. Student James, who has a prosthetic leg and has had his confidence knocked from dates in the past, is set up on a date with fellow student Emilie, who is making the brave move into the world of dating

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: More couples from some of the programme's most dramatic weddings look back on their big days. Rachel and Adam look back on their 1980s Aussie soap wedding, when Adam attempted to recreate the magical moment Jason Donovan married Kylie Minogue in Neighbours
